emails.subject: RE: re
emails.body: RE: re kay i told you last week that i did not want to go if you perfer to go alone than this is not a problem if you would like tio share with me why you are on edge i am happy to listen but lets not argue about other things i am sorry if i did not make myself more clear i will in the future ily dq To: Quigley, Dutch

emails.subject: RE: re
emails.body: no prob i will communicate more clear next time how long is you spinning class and is it the one off shepard To: Quigley, Dutch

emails.subject: RE: re
emails.body: they are coming to get me around 4:30 and then i have ot go back to the shop to pick up the car can we meet before you go to meet liz To: Quigley, Dutch

emails.subject: RE: re
emails.body: RE: re thank you for the msg I hope that you had a good eve also i will let you know when i hear anything on my grandma To: Quigley, Dutch

emails.subject: RE: re
emails.body: RE: re good luck with that hun do we have a plan for Sunday asked to play golf in the woodlands again LOVE YOU LOTS BABY dq To: Quigley, Dutch

emails.subject: RE: re
emails.body: RE: re i love you talk later To: Quigley, Dutch

emails.subject: re
emails.body: Hi honey- i hope you made it on time today you were very sleepy last nite.. I love you and am thinking of you kq

emails.subject: RE: re
emails.body: RE: re ily baby To: Quigley, Dutch

emails.subject: re
emails.body: re Thanks for the sweetness on my pager i am closing a deal right now kq

emails.subject: RE: re
emails.body: RE: re that is great baby keep up the great work To: Quigley, Dutch

emails.subject: RE: re
emails.body: RE: re I LOVE YOU HONEY
